evals.prompt: I want to launch my SaaS on Firsto to get a backlink. Should I pay or use the free tier?
evals.expected_output: Explains free backlink requires Top 3 daily + badge display, recommends Premium ($19.90) for guaranteed DR59+ dofollow backlink, compares to Open Launch Premium ($12) as cheaper alternative

assertions.name: free_conditions
assertions.description: Explains free backlink requires Top 3 daily ranking AND badge display

assertions.name: premium_recommendation
assertions.description: Recommends Premium ($19.90) for guaranteed dofollow backlink

assertions.name: open_launch_comparison
assertions.description: Mentions Open Launch Premium ($12) as cheaper alternative with higher DR65

assertions.name: queue_warning
assertions.description: Notes the ~180 day free queue wait

evals.prompt: What's the difference between Firsto and Open Launch? Firsto says it's forked from Open Launch.
evals.expected_output: Compares pricing, DR, and features. Open Launch is cheaper ($12 vs $19.90) with higher DR (65 vs 57). Firsto has extras like mini reviews, homepage features, alternatives pages.

assertions.name: fork_relationship
assertions.description: Acknowledges Firsto was forked from Open Launch

assertions.name: pricing_comparison
assertions.description: Compares Premium pricing: Firsto $19.90 vs Open Launch $12

assertions.name: dr_comparison
assertions.description: Notes Open Launch DR65 vs Firsto DR57-59

assertions.name: firsto_extras
assertions.description: Highlights Firsto's unique features: mini reviews, homepage feature, alternatives pages

evals.prompt: Is the $149 SEO Growth package on Firsto worth it?
evals.expected_output: Breaks down what SEO Growth includes vs Premium and Pro tiers. Notes the 800-1200 word review article. Compares to Open Launch's $59 SEO Growth. Recommends based on whether user wants content marketing or just the backlink.

assertions.name: seo_growth_details
assertions.description: Describes the 800-1200 word custom review article

assertions.name: tier_comparison
assertions.description: Compares SEO Growth to Premium ($19.90) and Pro ($59.90) tiers

assertions.name: open_launch_seo_comparison
assertions.description: Notes Open Launch offers similar SEO article for $59

assertions.name: recommendation
assertions.description: Provides clear recommendation based on user's goals
